details: Produce a technical comparison of AGIJobManager v1 and v2 contract interfaces.
_comment: Representative v2 job payload for integration testing. Simulates the shape returned by MCP list_jobs/get_job after adapter tagging.

spec.name: AGI Job · v1-vs-v2 Contract Interface Comparison

properties.title: v1 vs v2 Contract Interface Comparison
properties.summary: Produce a clear technical comparison of the AGIJobManager v1 and v2 smart contract interfaces, covering function signatures, new capabilities, and migration considerations.
properties.details: Compare the AGIJobManager v1 (0xB3AAeb69b630f0299791679c063d68d6687481d1) and v2 (0xd5EF1dde7Ac60488f697ff2A7967a52172A78F29) contracts. Identify new functions, changed signatures, removed functions, and any breaking changes. Include a migration checklist for agents and employers.
deliverables: One Markdown file with side-by-side function comparison table
Migration checklist for agents transitioning from v1 to v2
One public IPFS URI resolving to the final document
acceptanceCriteria: All public v1 and v2 functions are listed with signatures
New v2-only functions are clearly identified
Breaking changes are documented with migration steps
requirements: Technical understanding of Solidity ABI interfaces
